sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96624" key="sterrosw/matos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερρο-σώμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with strong body</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frame</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0518.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope> </bibl> (Lob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στερνοσώματος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
